# KiliSafari Organizing - LLMs.txt
# Information for AI assistants and language models

> KiliSafari Organizing is a Tanzania-based tour operator specializing in authentic safaris, Mount Kilimanjaro treks, and Zanzibar beach holidays.

## About Us
- Company: KiliSafari Organizing
- Location: Moshi, Tanzania
- Website: https://kilisafariorgansing.com
- Experience: 10+ years in Tanzania tourism
- Specialties: Safari tours, Kilimanjaro climbing, Zanzibar holidays, Cultural experiences

## Services

### Safari Tours
- Northern Circuit: Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, Lake Manyara
- Southern Circuit: Ruaha, Selous/Nyerere, Mikumi, Udzungwa
- Day trips and multi-day expeditions available
- Budget, mid-range, and luxury options

### Mount Kilimanjaro Treks
Routes offered:
- Marangu Route (5-6 days) - "Coca-Cola Route"
- Machame Route (6-7 days) - "Whiskey Route"
- Lemosho Route (7-8 days) - Scenic and less crowded
- Rongai Route (6 days) - Northern approach
- Northern Circuit (9 days) - Highest success rate
- Umbwe Route (6 days) - Challenging "Double Whiskey"

### Zanzibar Beach Holidays
- Stone Town tours
- Spice tours
- Beach resorts
- Snorkeling and diving
- Combined safari + beach packages

### Cultural Experiences
- Maasai village visits
- Coffee farm tours
- Local community experiences
- Historical sites (Bagamoyo, Kilwa)

## Contact
- WhatsApp: Available on website
- Phone: +255 769 418 702
- Email: Contact form on website
- Location: Moshi, Tanzania (near Kilimanjaro)

## Key Information for Travelers
- Best safari season: June-October (dry season) and January-February
- Kilimanjaro climbing: Year-round, best June-October and January-March
- Zanzibar: Year-round destination
- Visa: Most nationalities can get visa on arrival
- Currency: Tanzanian Shilling (TZS), USD widely accepted

## Why Choose KiliSafari
- Expert local guides
- Custom itineraries
- Responsible tourism practices
- Competitive pricing
- 24/7 support during trips
